title: Noah Lucas homepage v035 applied AI variant 1 hero
changeSummary: Aligns the homepage to Google Docs resume variant 1: Applied AI Product Systems.
Moves the resume strapline under Noah's name and above the hero CTA buttons.

Removes the standalone Product Thesis section and folds the page around AI-native systems, telemetry, autonomy, geospatial intelligence, developer platforms, physical AI, and mission-critical operations.
Preserves selected-work evidence, expanded Postmates scope, rounded glass treatment, mobile logo strip, images, and responsive layout.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at desktop and narrow responsive viewport; DOM, order, overflow, and console checks.
checks: Hero label, domains, and strapline match resume variant 1 language.
Strapline appears after the name and domains, before the CTA buttons; Product Thesis section is absent.
Narrow viewport wraps the hero copy cleanly; the known one-pixel refractive sampler overflow is unchanged.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
